main.description: A ledger record tracking the accumulation and expenditure of streak freezes. Forms a linked chain via the 'prev' field.

originService.description: The NSID of the service this inventory applies to.

policy.description: The URI of the policy governing this streak's rules.

subject.description: The name of the habit this inventory ledger belongs to (e.g., 'Daily Coding').

prev.description: Link to the previous inventory record in the ledger chain. Null if initializing.

action.description: The transaction type occurring in this ledger entry.

balance.description: The total number of freezes available *after* this action is applied.

relatedCheckin.description: The CID of the checkin record that earned or spent these freezes.

relatedFreezeGrant.description: The CID of the freezegrant record being claimed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when this inventory ledger entry was created.
